title: Flamingo/Spoonbill - Software update for standalone headset
scenario: DFU (software update) completes successfully on a standalone headset (not paired with charge case) via Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. On the Home screen, locate your standalone headset (not paired with a charge case) and tap the update button.
3. Verify that the Device Settings screen opens with the Software Update tab expanded and only one "Update" button visible.
4. Tap the "Update" button to initiate the DFU process.
5. Wait for the DFU process to complete on the standalone headset.
expected: The DFU process for the standalone headset completes successfully.
